bullets: Camera: pan an' zoom anywhere on da table.
Units: pick 'em from da list or da board, datasheet for da full stats.
Da left panel logs everyfing — Game Log an' Dice Log tabs.
Da big red button ends da phase. Da small one ends a unit's move.
Next lesson: Musterin' da Boyz — deployment, transports an' leaders.

prompt.text: Welcome to Basic Trainin'. You know da rules of da tabletop — dis teaches how [b]da app[/b] works. Use [i]Skip Step[/i] or [i]Exit Tutorial[/i] up 'ere any time.

prompt.kbm: Move da camera wiv {key:camera_pan_up} {key:camera_pan_left} {key:camera_pan_down} {key:camera_pan_right} or da arrow keys. Zoom wiv da mouse wheel. Go on — 'ave a look around.
prompt.pad: Pan da camera wiv {rs}. Zoom wiv {lt} an' {rt}. Go on — 'ave a look around.

done.script: return str(main.view_offset) != str(captured["off"]) or abs(main.view_zoom - captured["zoom"]) > 0.01

hint.text: Any pan or zoom counts — just nudge da view.

prompt.kbm: Click [b]Battlewagon[/b] in da unit list on da right — or click its token up in your deployment zone.
prompt.pad: Tap {rb} to cycle units until da [b]Battlewagon[/b] is picked.

done.script:
var mc = main.get("movement_controller")
return mc != null and str(mc.active_unit_id) == "U_BATTLEWAGON_T"

hint.text: Da unit list is top-right — da Battlewagon row.

prompt.kbm: Press {key:datasheet_modal} to open da unit's full datasheet.
prompt.pad: Press {y} to open da unit's full datasheet.

prompt.kbm: Da left panel logs everyfing wot 'appens. Click da [b]Dice Log[/b] tab — every roll ends up dere.
prompt.pad: Da left panel logs everyfing. Glide {ls} onto da [b]Dice Log[/b] tab an' press {a}.

done.script:
var glp = tree.root.get_node_or_null("/root/Main/GameLogPanel")
return glp != null and str(glp._active_tab) == "dice"

prompt.pad: Dat strip at da bottom always shows wot each button does [i]right now[/i]. It changes wiv da situation — when in doubt, read da bar.

prompt.kbm: Press {key:hotkey_help} to see every keyboard shortcut in da game.
Press {key:hotkey_help} again to put da cheat sheet away.

prompt.text: Dat big red button ends da current phase for good. [b]Don't[/b] press it yet — first, a bit of movin'.

prompt.kbm: Click [b]Gretchin[/b] in da unit list, den [b]drag[/b] one grot a short way forward an' drop it.
prompt.pad: Tap {rb} until da [b]Gretchin[/b] are picked, glide {ls} onto a grot, press {a} to grab it, walk it forward an' press {a} to drop it.

hint.text: Pick da Gretchin row first — den drag any single grot base. Keep 'im near his mates (wivin 2") an' don't drop him on top of anyone.

prompt.kbm: Press [b]End This Unit's Move[/b] on da right to lock da move in.
prompt.pad: Check da hint bar — confirm da move to lock it in.

prompt.text: Camera, pickin' units, datasheets, logs, an' yer first move order. Da next lesson covers [b]deployment, transports an' leaders[/b]. WAAAGH!
